title: Dutchie Dispensary Menu Scraper Output
description: Complete product menu data extracted from a Dutchie-powered dispensary. Each item represents one product variant (e.g. 1/8oz, 1g) with full pricing, potency, and availability details.

results.title: Product Results
results.description: All scraped product records stored in the default dataset. Each record contains product name, brand, category, price, THC/CBD levels, size, in-stock status, and metadata.
